ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Client, Editor, Writer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Article, Document) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the content was last updated */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the content */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content assignment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the content */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user (e.g., Editor, Writer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Assigned, Completed) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the content was assigned */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date the content was completed */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_assignments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being billed */,
  "total_word" INTEGER /* Total number of words produced by the client */,
  "total_word_for_editor" INTEGER /* Total number of words assigned to editors */,
  "total_article_for_editor" INTEGER /* Total number of articles assigned to editors */,
  "total_word_for_writer" INTEGER /* Total number of words assigned to writers */,
  "total_article_for_writer" INTEGER /* Total number of articles assigned to writers */,
  "pay_total_words_for_editor" INTEGER /* Total number of words paid for by editors */,
  "pay_total_words_for_writer" INTEGER /* Total number of words paid for by writers */,
  "pay_total_articles_for_editor" INTEGER /* Total number of articles paid for by editors */,
  "pay_total_articles_for_writer" INTEGER /* Total number of articles paid for by writers */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the billing record */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the billing record */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing record associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_billing_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_id") REFERENCES billing ("billing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in content history */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Edit, Publish) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_history_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Login, Logout, Create Content) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the content in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., New Comment, New Assignment) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
